profile_entries.title: Software Developer at Cyberium Group
profile_entries.content: Served as product team tech lead, collaborated with team members for work on three different company product streams. Optimized and scaled a blockchain-based Chrome extension from 1,000 to over 90,000 daily active users (DAUs). Headed the development of an employee training platform with integration of Unity and retrieval-augmented generative AI (RAG) components, establishing the platform as company's next flagship product. Oversaw operations of the company's flagship software product, ensuring service delivery to 50–90 corporate client users. Headed AI/ML research in company SRED initiatives, composed and presented research reports for key stakeholders. Technologies: Python, ML/AI, C#, SQL, MySQL, Javascript, Node.js, Typescript, HTML, SCSS, React, Redis, Angular, ASP.NET, Unity, Azure, Azure AI Foundry, GCP, Linux, FastAPI, Jest, Jmeter, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Slack

profile_entries.title: Software Developer (Volunteer, Remote) at Sikh Research Institute
profile_entries.content: Configured and deployed an Omeka CMS to host and enable public access to over 10,000 archive records. Implemented data pipeline for processing up to 500 records at once, reducing manual data entry time by 75%. Technologies: ETL, Javascript, Typescript, HTML, CSS, Python, ORM, Next.js, Redux, Omeka, Git

profile_entries.title: Software Developer (Volunteer) at Simon Fraser University
profile_entries.content: Developed a robust web portal and CMS for the SFU Iranian Club using Next.js and Strapi. Implemented internationalization (i18n) component to support multilingual content in web portal. Utilized AWS Amplify for frontend hosting, lowering operation expenses by 50% by configuring instances for scale to 0. Technologies: Javascript, Typescript, HTML, CSS, Next.js, AWS, Strapi, UI/UX, Product Design, Git

profile_entries.title: Software Tester at Gatekeeper Systems
profile_entries.content: Executed over 100 firmware test cases, detecting over 60 defects in firmware before release to production. Executed network performance tests on Gatekeeper's web services, identifying 3 critical network issues during operation. Served as Scrum Master, fostering a collaborative team environment that boosted morale and increased team productivity. Technologies: Firmware, Embedded Software, QA, Python, JIRA, Git
